name: South Carolina LLR Contractor License Lookup

agency.name: South Carolina Department of Labor, Licensing and Regulation

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official lookup before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: South Carolina Contractor's Licensing Board records exposed by the public lookup
knownExclusions: South Carolina residential builder records use a separate LLR lookup path and are not included in this source entry.
Local permits, business registrations, and non-LLR authorizations are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate lookup pages unless access terms and technical controls are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for the Contractor's Licensing Board. Add a separate source entry if residential builders are modeled.
maintainerNotes: South Carolina has multiple construction-related boards; keep source scope explicit.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
